meaning: n.容器(箱,盆,罐,壶,桶,坛子),集装箱
examples: The metal container began to emit a clicking sound.
Do not fill the container more than two-thirds full.
Food will last longer if kept in an airtight container.
The container terminal is controlled by Hong Kong billionaire, and Asia's richest man, Li Ka-shing.
When I go to The Container Store I may want one of many things.
